summary: The diff modifies ScreenRecorder.tsx to add an in-app video preview player after screen recording stops. The implementation uses URL.createObjectURL from the recorded Blob, includes a previewUrl state, clearPreviewUrl helper, and proper object URL cleanup on unmount. The file summary confirms the preview player is present with controls, is labelled, and is cleared on upload/discard/new recording. All REQ-6 acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.
